# freeipa_hbacrule (Data Source)

Reads details of a FreeIPA HBAC rule.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the HBAC rule (cn).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the HBAC rule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the HBAC rule is enabled.
- `groups` (Set of String) Associated user groups.
- `host_category` (String) Host category.
- `hosts` (Set of String) Associated hosts.
- `id` (String) Unique name of the HBAC rule.
- `service_category` (String) Service category.
- `services` (Set of String) Associated HBAC services.
- `user_category` (String) User category.
- `users` (Set of String) Associated users.
